store_headline: WordPress Theme for Record Labels with Multi-Artist Management
store_subheadline: Manage and promote your entire artist roster with one multi-artist label platform
features: Band and record label-focused design and functionality
Comprehensive artist management and profile system
Discography management with integrated audio players
Event and tour management with booking capabilities
Portfolio showcase for projects and collaborations
Advanced playlist manager with custom audio players
Elementor page builder with music industry-specific elements
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
WooCommerce integration for merchandise and music sales
Contact forms for booking inquiries and fan engagement
Multi-artist roster management for record labels
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
One-click demo import with complete band and label setups
selling_points: Deep red stage lighting hero — the most dramatically visual label theme in the catalog
"MUSIC AS LANGUAGE" editorial identity baked into the design system, not bolted on
Multi-artist roster system: individual profiles linked to discography, events, and videos per act
The high-energy alternative to Herion's institutional restraint — for labels that need presence, not credibility
Female vocalist full-bleed hero photography signals passion and artistry over corporate polish
Elementor-powered for label marketing pages, roster showcases, and release campaigns
WooCommerce for label merchandise, digital downloads, and direct-to-fan sales
Wolf Artists plugin creates the artist taxonomy infrastructure single-artist themes cannot replicate
key_benefits: Manage and promote an entire artist roster from one dramatic label platform
Give each artist a profile linked to releases, events, and videos
Build a label brand that commands attention with cinematic deep-red stage design
Sell merchandise and music across your entire roster through one WooCommerce storefront
Attract artists with a label site that signals A&R seriousness
Differentiate from Herion's institutional approach with a label identity built for impact
Run every release, tour, and merch campaign from one Elementor hub
design_features: Band and record label-oriented layout templates
Portfolio presentation for projects and collaborations
Multiple header styles with music industry aesthetics
Artist biography and profile management sections
